# Privacy Policy — Altium Copilot

Altium Copilot runs entirely on your local machine.

- **No data leaves your device.** Schematic files and netlist data are read locally and returned directly to Claude Desktop. Nothing is uploaded to a remote server.
- **No telemetry or analytics** of any kind.
- **Local writes** are limited to `%USERPROFILE%\.ee-in-a-box\` — a project registry, update state file, and optional schematic review reports you explicitly save.
- **Update check:** on startup the extension fetches a version string from GitHub Releases to check for updates. No user data is sent.
- **No credentials or secrets** are accessed or stored.

For questions or concerns, open an issue at [github.com/ee-in-a-box/altium-copilot/issues](https://github.com/ee-in-a-box/altium-copilot/issues).
